title: Senior Doctor - Kokilaben Dhirubhai Ambani Hospital - Apply Now

jsonLd.title: Senior Doctor - Kokilaben Dhirubhai Ambani Hospital - Apply Now
jsonLd.description:
Kokilaben Dhirubhai Ambani Hospital, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Senior Doctor for our Aurangabad operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Kokilaben Dhirubhai Ambani Hospital:
Kokilaben Dhirubhai Ambani Hospital is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Aurangabad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Kokilaben Dhirubhai Ambani Hospital!
